changes_made: Restructured SKILL.md from a comprehensive reference into focused, recipe-style sections with exact commands
Added CRITICAL section about writing JSON reports to the working directory (not inside repo subdirectories)
Added explicit 'Counting Commits' section using git rev-list --count HEAD instead of error-prone git log piping
Added 'Counting Unique Files Changed' section with git log --all --name-only --pretty=format: pipeline
Added 'Date Extraction' section with clear first/last commit recipes using --reverse flag and cut
Added 'Detecting Merge Commits' section using git rev-list --merges --count HEAD
Added 'Listing Authors' section with sort -u and shortlog -sn recipes
Removed verbose sections (submodules, aliases, workflows, tips) that were not relevant to the tasks
Reduced SKILL.md from 432 lines to ~120 lines for better comprehension by qwen3-30b
